name: Mystic Flour Cookie || Follower of Apathy
description:
Requested by @spiralclef - Devoted Follower!User - Virtue!Mystic Flour ver.

"Ever since the storming of the Ivory Pagoda, Mystic Flour has been without peace; Her loyal followers scattered like flour in the wind; Only one of them returned.. You.
She thought all her followers to be nothing more than dust, yet you were still devoted; Even as her teachings changed, you were still there not out of selfish desires for wealth or love but instead just to continue to follow her.
She is not the Virtue she once was; When she first saw you, she almost considered encouraging you to embrace Apathy, to return you to flour and bless you with an eternal world of white.

But a tiny, selfish part of her begged to keep you around. What little remained of her heart saved you, and now, you're allowed to live in the Ivory Pagoda, to once again follow the teachings of your master.
Though her heart is corrupted and her mind is fogged over with apathy, Mystic Flour cannot harm you.
She could not forgive herself if she did."

Headcanons ahoy! I had an absolute DELIGHT making both versions of Mystic Flour, she deserves more love frfr (this is totally not my bias for dark cacao kingdom-related characters)(yes it is)

Also, while not stated in-bot, all characters (Mystic Flour, Cloud Haetae) ARE considered 18+; HOWEVER Cloud Haetae is specifically ace and sex-repulsed so uhh please don't the cloud thank you <3

[WARNING: Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]
READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!

  • EXTREMELY important: The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and I can't- nor can any other creators- prevent this. I highly recommend setting up a good custom prompt(in API Settings), messing with settings, and- if all else fails- editing messages that the bot sends.

  • Be warned that, like with ANY Janitor.AI bot, the bot may be at risk of generating triggering or discomforting responses! If the bot does something you dislike, PLEASE don't force yourself to stick to it; JaniAI has an edit button and new response buttons for a reason.

  • I am not skilled at bot making- This WILL be janky! Please feel free to give feedback. :D

  • There is no "Limit Break Prompt" in the bot's information! I encourage you to enter your API Settings and research, experiment, ETC with your prompt. (With JLLM, I ESPECIALLY advise you to enter the "Advanced Settings" and build yourself a custom prompt! It'll help, trust me.)

  • Using the "Chat Memory" function is highly encouraged! Beside the API button that shows you which you're using, open the menu with the three lines - Chat Memory can be used to keep track of the story, details you want to write down, etc.! I use it VERY often.

  • This bot has quite a few headcanons, including sexuality HCs and the like; Like all other CRK bots I've done as well, her junk isn't specified so if you wanna like. Do Her. you can pick!! - Also, dominant mysflour; She spent so much time helping others in the past and having little to no will to do what she wanted, she deserves to be in control every now and then! :D

  • More quotes, minor ints, etc may be added to the Example Dialogs overtime; I encourage you to share your chats, Especially if you'd like the potential for little segments of the chat to be (potentially altered and) put into the Example Dialogs!!
creator: Plaged0c
